intended_use: nordicMEDiVA is indicated for image analysis and visualization of functional and dynamic MRI data of the brain, presenting derived properties and parameters from the input image data in a clinically u
intended_use_full: nordicMEDiVA is indicated for image analysis and visualization of functional and dynamic MRI data of the brain, presenting derived properties and parameters from the input image data in a clinically useful context.
target_condition: Functional and dynamic brain MRI analysis; no specific disease condition targeted
ground_truth: Internal and external clinical expert review of analysis results; comparison to predicate device (nordicBrainEx) and reference device (nordicMEDiVA K241608) results
other_metrics: Lin's Concordance Correlation Coefficient for DSC results: ≥0.8
